---
title: "modelling 2.0"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
```


```{r}
egg_size_raw_results <- read.csv(here("data", "raw results - laura's method.csv"))
#need to add an individual egg_ID column too, then need to merge both datasets together.

clutch_size_results <- read.csv(here("data", "emergence_egg_counts(Sheet1).csv"))


clutch_size_results$green_eggs  <- as.numeric(clutch_size_results$green_eggs)
clutch_size_results$orange_eggs <- as.numeric(clutch_size_results$orange_eggs)


clutch_size_results <- clutch_size_results %>%
  filter(sex == "F") %>% #only looking at females
  filter(!startsWith(adultID, "F")) %>% #remove sienna's females
  mutate(clutch_size = green_eggs + orange_eggs) %>%
  filter(!is.na(clutch_size)) %>% #remove those with NA clutch size
  mutate(larval_treatment = str_extract(adultID, "^[^.]+")) %>% #make larval treatment column
  mutate(
    larval_treatment = recode(
      larval_treatment,
      CTRL = "ambient",
      MEAN = "mean",
      COOL = "cool",
      WARM = "warm",
      HOT  = "hot"
    ))
```


```{r}
#this is what I am aiming for in the end

lm1 <- lmer(egg_size ~ pupal_temperature + clutch_code, data = )
```
